items.how_used: 使用神经网络填充缺失数据，填充误差为3%
items.source_excerpt: We also use a neural network to fill the missing values of the data. The testified error of the filled data value is 3%.

items.how_used: 使用灰色关联分析筛选与评价指标高度相关的因素
items.source_excerpt: We screen the indicators based on the principle of objectiveness and quantifiability and use grey correlation analysis to screen the factors with high correlation.

items.how_used: 使用熵权法为指标分配客观权重，构建综合评估模型
items.source_excerpt: we use entropy weight method to assign objective weights to the indicators and obtain the ultimate comprehensive model for roller coasters.

items.how_used: 通过灵敏度分析测试模型稳定性
items.source_excerpt: We test the stability of our model using sensitivity analysis.

items.how_used: 使用模糊评价方法量化描述性指标，建立更全面的指标评价体系
items.source_excerpt: we establish a more comprehensive indicator evaluation system and use fuzzy evaluation method to quantify the descriptive indicators.

items.how_used: 使用主成分分析进行数据降维
items.source_excerpt: Data dimensionality reduction based on PCA Analysis

items.how_used: 对数据进行无量纲化处理
